an5.210:1.1: “Monks, there are these five drawbacks for one who falls asleep unalert & with muddled mindfulness.
an5.210:1.3: “One sleeps badly, wakes up badly, dreams evil dreams. The devas don’t protect one. Semen is emitted.
an5.210:1.4: “These, monks, are the five drawbacks for one who falls asleep unalert & with muddled mindfulness.
an5.210:2.1: “There are these five rewards for one who falls asleep alert & with mindfulness established.
an5.210:2.3: “One sleeps easily, wakes up easily, dreams no evil dreams. The devas protect one. Semen is not emitted.
an5.210:2.4: “These, monks, are the five rewards for one who falls asleep alert & with mindfulness established.”
